Game.Name: Nintama Rantarou Special (Japan)
Game.plot: Nintama Rantarou Special is an Action game, published by Culture Brain,which was released in Japan in 1996.Cheat: Stage PasswordsAt the main menu, select Story, select Password, select which you difficulty you want to play in, and enter any one of the following passwords to go to the corresponding part of the game:
Game.Notes: Nintama Rantarou Special is an Action game, published by Culture Brain, which was released in Japan in 1996.
